meaning: n.细胞性,多孔性,细胞结构
examples: We are studying cellularity these days.
Objective: To study the value of bone marrow biopsy imprint in evaluating cellularity.
The purpose of this study was to evaluate the effect of obstructive jaundice on gut immune cellularity.
Sometimes the development of the extra functions of multi-cellularity has required the evolution of new domains.
Patients with mixed cellularity or lymphocyte deplete subtypes of HL often have HL involving the liver.
